description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which is bordered by a slightly raised edge that provides a clean, modern look. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand that connects centrally to the back panel, offering stability and a low profile. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a gentle curve and no visible ports or buttons. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile, with the screen tapering slightly towards the edges and the stand protruding at the base. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding, buttons, or decorative elements.
description: A slim, rectangular computer monitor with a matte black frame and a sturdy pedestal stand, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display area framed by a thin, matte black bezel and a central pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the protruding rectangular base of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unadorned back panel with a central stand attachment and no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the shape of the stand's base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, and has a flat, untextured appearance with slightly rounded corners and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base and a central vertical support, made of matte black plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
